known_gaps: W318/W271のstrict AddCommGrp入力は、WPP-op colimit後のkernel exactness保存本体が未証明である。
W318/W271のleft LCA入力は、WPP-op colimit-mapのinjectivity、inducing、closed image certificate本体が未証明である。
W318のleft closed-embedding入力は純MetrizableLCA WPP-op colimit-mapのinjectivity、induced topology、closed image certificateへ縮約済みだが、その三つのcertificate本体は未証明である。
W302/W304/W308のmapping-cone comparison routeはincluded colimit入力から接続されたが、これだけでは製品全体のexact-category/stable-derived目標は完了しない。
W296/W319のAddCommGrpCat kernel exactness/WPP-op colimit exactness保存定理本体はまだsource theoremとして未証明である。
W297/W301のleft closed-embedding preservationはinjectivity、induced topology、closed image certificateへ縮約済みだが、三つの位相的certificate本体は未証明である。
W318のleft closed-embedding preservationとalgebraic exactness preservationは引き続き未証明である。
W318のleft closed-embedding branchは純LCA colimit-map injective/inducing/closed-image certificateへ縮約されたが、その三certificate本体は未証明である。
W271はW318の残り二つの純source frontierを直接消費する形になったが、左LCA certificateとstrict AddCommGrp kernel exactness保存の本体証明はまだ未証明である。
v361でleft LCA certificateはdescended quotient mapのrelation-preimage exactnessとclosed-map/closed-range入力へ分解されたが、その二入力は未証明である。
v362でstrict AddCommGrp境界はSnakeInput cokernel-row certificateへ縮約されたが、そのcertificate本体は未証明である。
v361でleft LCA routeはdescended quotient mapのrelation-preimage exactnessとclosed-mapまたはclosed-range入力へ分解されたが、その二入力はまだ未証明である。
v362でstrict AddCommGrp routeはWPP-op colimit短複体をSnakeInputのcokernel rowとして提示するcertificateへ縮約されたが、そのcertificate本体はまだ未証明である。
残りのsource certificate、完全な抽出packet、clean external audit、fresh claim reviewが揃うまでproduct successではない。

support_result_classification: support W272 manually ported and parent-verified; no product success claim. v294: W271 was ported as a checked boundary, not product success. v295: W273 was ported as a checked boundary, not product success. v296: parent-added counterexample rejects the W229/W273 plain quasi-isomorphism conflation transport route; not product success. v297: W276 was ported as a checked boundary reducing W271 mapping-cone comparison to object-level WPP-op cone/colimit comparison; W275 was delayed because v296 refuted its plain quasi-isomorphism conflation transport bridge. Not product success. v298: W274 was ported as a checked schema refinement for opposite fixed-target fac/uniq obligations; not product success. v299: parent-added W271 exact-acyclic WPP-op colimit closure boundary reducing it to degreewise short-complex colimit comparison and short-complex Conflation colimit closure; not product success. v300: parent-added proof of the W299 degreewise short-complex colimit comparison using HomologicalComplex.eval colimit preservation and ShortComplex.isColimitOfIsColimitπ; not product success. v301: parent-inspected support W277 and reimplemented a boundary reducing WPP-op ShortComplex Conflation closure to four MetrizableLCA.strictShortExact field-closure inputs; not product success. v302: parent-inspected support W278 and reimplemented a boundary fixing the WPP-op object-level mapping-cone diagram and cocone; remaining input is IsColimit for mappingConeCocone; not product success. v303: parent-inspected support W281 and reimplemented the fixed mappingConeCocone colimit input as an explicit desc/fac/uniq universal boundary; not product success. v304: parent-inspected support W282 and reimplemented the safe HomotopyEquiv target-data boundary; source categorical exactness now follows from exactAcyclic MetrizableLCA K under homology inputs, but target topology/right-end/homology-preservation data remain open; not product success. v304-v308: parent verified W282-derived HomotopyEquiv target data plus additional generated WPP-op mapping-cone, strict field, and opposite fixed-target audit boundaries; W306 was repaired to remove a failed uniformization/sorry and conservatively retain the two-target boundary; not product success.
